board.header: Slice-5 worktree line added; Last updated 2026-07-19 (Slice 0 in flight) -> 2026-07-20 (Slice 5 code-complete on-branch; awaiting Steward land).
board.section_1: Rewritten. Slice 5 code-complete on orch-0.8.20-s5 @ 8e09b950, codex §9 terminal PASS after three fix rounds, awaiting Steward land + the §4 #7-#12 HITL decisions. Slice 0 recorded COMPLETE + HITL-SIGNED at 403eb254. The false line 'Slices 5+ MUST NOT start until the HITL signs' was REMOVED.
board.section_2: Slice 0 -> COMPLETE (HITL-SIGNED, 403eb254). Slice 5 -> COMPLETE on-branch @ 8e09b950, codex PASS, awaiting land. 10/15/20/25/30/40 left 'not started'.
board.section_3: AC-079 = BUILT, AWAITING HITL SIGN-OFF, NOT SIGNED (exact symbol set enumerated). AC-080 = BUILT, GREEN. AC-041 = VERIFIED GREEN, denylist unchanged at five.
board.section_4: Six new decisions #7-#12 added with ledger ids and recommendations.
board.section_11: NEW Slice-5 close: work items, four codex rounds, gates with real exit codes, what the slice proved wrong, owed HITL items, closure artifacts.

changelog.policy: VERIFIED-THEN-EXTENDED, not duplicated. 5d had already written the SourceId BREAKING entry, the projections_invalidated/rows_invalidated count-increase entry, the retention-cap entry, the erase_source / doctor orphan-provenance / erasure-completeness / excise_collection_record Added entries, the new-public-types entry and the Erasure docs entry.
extended: Retention cap entry now also names the exempt pending-redaction queue (erasure_pending_redaction) and states the operator consequence (cap bounds SWEEPABLE rows, not physical rows) — TC-24.
NEW entry: Schema version 20 -> 21, one-way, documenting the deliberate node/edge backfill asymmetry and why the logical_id gate is right for nodes and wrong for edges.
ErasureIncomplete bullet extended to the fix-3 rotated-sink case and the durable pending-redaction obligation.
excise_collection_record bullet extended with the fix-3 refusal to address the engine's own erasure bookkeeping.
already_present_verified: erase_source as a new governed SDK verb
projections_invalidated / rows_invalidated count increase (v2 deletions now counted)

ledger.action: COMMITTED AS-IS. Not hand-edited. seq 32 -> 43; entries seq 33-43 carry TC-20 (x2), TC-21, TC-22, TC-23, TC-24, TC-25, TC-26, TC-27, TC-28, TC-29.

discrepancies_found.detail: Task said six untracked 0.8.20-slice-5*-output.json; seven exist. All seven committed. No action needed.

Ledger entry seq 39 (TC-26) refs git:989fd7ef, not the fix-1 head 00b46b84 given in the task table. Both are real commits on the branch: 989fd7ef is the P1 edge-backfill fix commit itself, 00b46b84 is the fix-1 round head. The ledger ref is MORE precise, not wrong. Ledger left untouched; the board's §11.1 table records fix-1 as 00b46b84 'via 989fd7ef'.

discrepancies_found.item: scripts/agent-lint-md.sh is VACUOUSLY GREEN in this worktree
discrepancies_found.detail: It exited 0 silently ONLY because node_modules/.bin/markdownlint-cli2 is absent in a linked worktree, so the structural lint self-skips. I re-ran the real linter via `npx --yes markdownlint-cli2` (real exit 1): the ONLY 9 issues are pre-existing MD025/MD001 in dev/research/personal-agent-database-market-2026-07-02.md, untouched by this branch since c366d6e0 (2026-07-02). CHANGELOG.md lints CLEAN. The STATUS board is inside the config's `dev/plans/runs/**` ignore, so it is not linted at all. Two separate observations for the Steward: (a) the md gate self-skips to green from any worktree, same vacuous-green class as TC-13/TC-25; (b) if the main tree HAS node_modules, agent-lint-md.sh is presently RED there on that pre-existing research file, independent of 0.8.20.

gates.note: No code gate was re-run by this docs task — nothing under src/ changed. The gate results recorded in board §11.3 are the orchestrator's own re-verification on 8e09b950, transcribed verbatim, not re-measured here.
